summary.notes: Static analysis only. No build, lint, or sync run. Hex sweep ignores src/app/globals.css, src/app/styleguide/page.tsx, src/__tests__, *.test.* and *.spec.*. Address-string false positives in src/lib/directives/units.ts (#102 etc.) excluded. Phase 6 carry-over for Badge migration is acknowledged (CLAUDE.md Section 9). PageHeader is missing on three of four per-role detail pages (marines, leader, admin) - commander is the only one wired correctly. Spacing-scale check uses Tailwind 4 numeric units; allowed set {1,2,3,4,6,8,12,16} corresponds to the 4/8/12/16/24/32/48/64 px scale.

findings.snippet: ad-hoc <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight" style={{ fontFamily: "var(--font-display)" }}>
findings.message: Detail page does not import or render PageHeader from @/components/domain/page-header. Hand-rolled meta row plus h1 violates the locked four-line page header pattern.
findings.fix: Replace the hand-rolled meta-row plus h1 plus summary block with <PageHeader> wired to the same fields.

findings.snippet: ad-hoc <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight" style={{ fontFamily: "var(--font-display)" }}>

findings.snippet: <h2 className="mt-8 text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight" style={{ fontFamily: "var(--font-display)" }}>
findings.message: Bebas Neue (font-display / var(--font-display)) applied to h2 in body content. Per spec, Bebas Neue is reserved for hero h1, role card h3, and PageHeader h1. H2 takes Inter 22/700.
findings.fix: Drop the inline font-family override and the font-display class so the h2 renders as Inter 22/700.

findings.snippet: <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 font-semibold text-[var(--color-marine-blue)] dark:text-[#B5C4DC]">
findings.message: Hardcoded hex value #B5C4DC outside src/app/globals.css. Reference a token from globals.css.
findings.fix: Define a semantic token in globals.css and reference it via var(--token-name).
references: Section 5: Tokens in src/app/globals.css. No hardcoded hex outside tests.

findings.message: Badge is deprecated per CLAUDE.md Section 3.7. Migrate to Pill at src/components/ui/pill.tsx.
findings.fix: Replace `import { Badge }` with `import { Pill }` and update JSX accordingly. Phase 6 carry-over (CLAUDE.md Section 9) tracks this migration.

findings.message: Badge JSX in non-deprecated path. Migrate to Pill (src/components/ui/pill.tsx).
findings.fix: Replace `<Badge variant=...>` with `<Pill variant=...>`.

findings.snippet: <aside role="note" aria-label={`IPAC routing - ${cfg.label}`} className={cn("my-5 rounded-r-[var(--radius-sm)] border-l-4 px-4 py-3 text-sm", className)}
findings.message: Standalone <aside> with hand-rolled border-l-4 callout styling outside src/components/domain/callout.tsx. Should compose Callout with a custom variant or eyebrow.
findings.fix: Refactor IPACRoutingCallout to wrap <Callout> and pass a domain-specific eyebrow plus icon, instead of duplicating callout markup.

findings.message: Tailwind spacing utility outside the locked 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 24 / 32 / 48 / 64 scale (allowed unit set {1,2,3,4,6,8,12,16}).
findings.fix: Round to the nearest allowed unit. Example, mt-10 becomes mt-8 or mt-12, p-5 becomes p-4 or p-6.
